title: Make money recommending on your social networks
body:
## Join ADman. Recommend to your Facebook, Twitter or Blog friends the best offers and you will be rewarded financially

[![](http://nestor.admanmedia.com/system/blog_image_2s/78/medium/Image2_ADman.jpg)](http://9e86c04efd24f186800.adm-blog.com?blog_perm=8b483d38 "Join ADman. Recommend to your Facebook, Twitter or Blog friends the best offers and you will be rewarded financially") 

### What is ADmanMedia?

[ADman Media](http://9e86c04efd24f186800.adm-blog.com?blog_perm=8b483d38 "ADman Media") is a tool with which you can recommend products or services easily on Facebook, Twitter, Blogs,... You will receive a financial reward for each effective recommendation you make. Where can I make the promotions? At this moment you can do it on Facebook, Twitter and Tumblr, Blogs,... And soon you will be able to do it in many more sites. We will keep you informed of the new social media we are incorporating. Is this spamming my friends? No, it is you who chooses what you want to [recommend based on what you like and what your friends like](http://9e86c04efd24f186800.adm-blog.com?blog_perm=8b483d38 "ADman Media"). Many times we are sharing products with our friends that we have liked and that we know they will like without any compensation, because why not continue doing the same and also get paid for it. ![](http://buzz.admanmedia.com/aff_i?offer_id=42&aff_id=242)
